libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use in-process cache configurations only; no external service is normally required. Disable Ehcache update checks in tests via System.setProperty("net.sf.ehcache.skipUpdateCheck", "true") or Configuration.updateCheck(false). For transaction tests, write Bitronix configuration to a JUnit temp directory, set bitronix.tm.configuration to that file, disable Bitronix JMX, use the null journal, and shut down the transaction manager after each test.

deterministic_setup.reason: ehcache-core declares JTA as provided, while its transaction APIs and DefaultTransactionManagerLookup use javax.transaction types.
DefaultTransactionManagerLookup explicitly auto-detects Bitronix and reflectively registers Ehcache XA resources through Bitronix resource classes.
Bitronix has optional JMS API references; adding the JMS spec keeps the embedded transaction manager classpath complete during JVM/native-image tests.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8877 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.sf.ehcache:ehcache-core:2.5.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Basic cache, element, XML/configuration, search, and disk-persistence coverage is reachable without these dependencies; the added dependencies are specifically for transaction-manager/XA coverage.
Avoid Terracotta clustering, Hibernate integration, and servlet/web constructs unless separately adding their optional dependencies; they are not needed for core local-cache coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Ehcache core can be exercised locally without Docker, but meaningful coverage of its transaction-manager path needs optional/provided transaction dependencies that are not pulled by the normal scaffold.
